title: Crispy Saudia Crustaceans Stir-fry
description: This salty and crispy dish features saudi arabian crustaceans that are both vegetarian-friendly and perfect for brunch.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and onions, cooking until translucent and golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Add cumin seeds and turmeric powder. Cook for another minute.
Carefully add the shrimp to the pan. Do not overcrowd the pan as this could reduce heat and affect browning.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Stir-fry until the crustaceans turn golden brown on all sides, about 3-5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
